patch.value: GH-550: extension list flags are erased at the real CLI boundary

Fix list:true registerCommand flags so one, comma-separated, repeated, and interleaved alias values reach extension handlers through the built CLI without being replaced by an empty loose-occurrence array.

Built CLI parser preserves one/comma/repeated/interleaved list values in occurrence order; omitted flags retain declared defaults; focused extension startup and CLI integration tests cover the real boundary.

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-14: pm search GH-550 --status all returned no item. Related closed pm-kfq5 covered repeated occurrence accumulation but GitHub #550 reports a distinct real-CLI coercion regression in 2026.7.13. Source: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/550
